title: arum orientale subsp. albispathum
intro: Arum orientale subsp. albispathum, also known as the Eastern White Arum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Araceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include relief from arthritis, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Arum orientale subsp. albispathum is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
